title: Hoffmannseggia minor
taxonomy: Hoffmannseggia minor is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the Americas and is known by the common names of small devil's thorn or little devil's thorn. The plant is a member of the subfamily Faboideae, which includes a wide range of legumes. Hoffmannseggia minor is further divided into several subspecies and varieties based on its morphological characteristics. As a member of the Fabaceae family, Hoffmannseggia minor is closely related to other legumes such as beans and peas.
